title: A1 Exam Practice: Reading & Listening
description: A1-level exam practice for reading and listening comprehension. Read personal emails, announcements, menus, signs, and schedules. Listen to dialogues in stores, at the doctor, in restaurants, on the phone, and asking for directions. Includes A1 grammar multiple-choice on present tense, accusative case, and gender agreement.

exercises.prompt: Read the personal email and answer the questions.

data.prompt_en: Read the email from Tomáš and answer the questions.
data.text_cz:
Ahoj Lucie,
jak se máš? Já se mám dobře. Jsem v Praze u babičky. Babička bydlí v centru. Dnes je hezké počasí a my jdeme do parku. Zítra jedeme autobusem do Brna. Mám se tady moc rád. Napiš mi, jak se máš!
Tvůj Tomáš
data.text_en: Hi Lucie, how are you? I'm fine. I'm in Prague at my grandma's. Grandma lives in the center. Today the weather is nice and we're going to the park. Tomorrow we're going by bus to Brno. I really like it here. Write me how you are! Yours, Tomáš

questions.question_en: Where does grandma live?
How are they going to Brno tomorrow?

exercises.prompt: Read the train station announcement and answer.

data.prompt_en: Read the train announcement and answer.
data.text_cz: Vážení cestující, vlak číslo 125 do Plzně odjíždí z nástupiště 3 v 10:15. Nástup do vlaku je z nástupiště 3. Vlak jede přes Beroun. Děkujeme.
data.text_en: Dear passengers, train number 125 to Plzeň departs from platform 3 at 10:15. Boarding is from platform 3. The train goes via Beroun. Thank you.

questions.question_en: Where is the train going?
What time does the train depart?

exercises.prompt: Read the restaurant menu and answer.

data.prompt_en: Read the restaurant menu and answer.
data.text_cz:
RESTAURACE U LIPA — JÍDELNÍ LÍSTEK
Polévka: gulášová polévka — 45 Kč
Hlavní jídla: Svíčová na smetaně — 185 Kč | Vepřový řízek s bramborem — 150 Kč | Smažený sýr s hranolkami — 130 Kč
Nápoje: pivo 0,5 l — 35 Kč | domácí limonáda — 40 Kč
data.text_en:
RESTAURANT U LIPA — MENU
Soup: goulash soup — 45 CZK
Main dishes: Beef sirloin in cream — 185 CZK | Pork schnitzel with potato — 150 CZK | Fried cheese with fries — 130 CZK
Drinks: beer 0.5 l — 35 CZK | homemade lemonade — 40 CZK

questions.question_en: How much does fried cheese cost?
Which dish is the cheapest?

exercises.prompt: Read the street sign and answer.

data.prompt_en: Read the street sign and answer.
data.text_cz:
ZÁKAZ VSTUPU!
Tento park je uzavřen od 22:00 do 6:00. Psi musí být na vodítku. Děkujeme za pochopení.
data.text_en:
NO ENTRY!
This park is closed from 10 PM to 6 AM. Dogs must be on a leash. Thank you for your understanding.

questions.question_en: When is the park closed?
What must dogs have?

exercises.prompt: Read the daily schedule and answer.

data.prompt_en: Read the daily schedule and answer.
data.text_cz: Můj den: Vstávám v 7:00. Snídám v 7:30 — piju čaj a jím chleba s máslem. V 8:00 jdu do školy. Obědvám ve 12:00 ve školní jídelně. Od 14:00 do 16:00 mám hodiny. V 17:00 se vracím domů a dělám úkoly. Večer čtu knihu nebo se dívám na televizi.
data.text_en: My day: I get up at 7:00. I have breakfast at 7:30 — I drink tea and eat bread with butter. At 8:00 I go to school. I have lunch at 12:00 in the school canteen. From 2 PM to 4 PM I have classes. At 5 PM I return home and do my homework. In the evening I read a book or watch TV.

questions.question_cz: V kolik hodin jde do školy?
questions.question_en: What time does he go to school?
What does he do in the evening?
options: Čte knihu nebo se dívá na televizi

exercises.answer_key: V 8:00; Čte knihu nebo se dívá na televizi

exercises.prompt: Listen to the store dialogue and answer.

data.prompt_en: Listen to the dialogue in a store and answer.
data.transcript_cz:
Prodavačka: Dobrý den, můžete mi pomoci? Hledám dárek pro maminku.
Zákazník: Dobrý den. Jaký dárek byste chtěl?
Prodavačka: Chtěl bych šálu. Jakou máte barvu?
Zákazník: Máme červenou, modrou a zelenou. Červená stojí 350 Kč, modrá 280 Kč.
Prodavačka: Beru modrou. Tady jsou peníze. Děkuji.
Zákazník: Děkuji vám, na shledanou!
data.transcript_en:
Shop assistant: Hello, can you help me? I'm looking for a gift for my mom.
Customer: Hello. What kind of gift would you like?
Shop assistant: I'd like a scarf. What colors do you have?
Customer: We have red, blue and green. Red costs 350 CZK, blue 280 CZK.
Shop assistant: I'll take the blue one. Here's the money. Thank you.
Customer: Thank you, goodbye!

questions.question_en: What color scarf is he buying?
How much does the blue scarf cost?

exercises.prompt: Listen to the doctor appointment and answer.

data.prompt_en: Listen to the doctor's appointment and answer.
data.transcript_cz:
Lékař: Dobrý den, co vás trápí?
Pacient: Dobrý den, mám bolest v krku a teplotu.
Lékař: Jak dlouho to trvá?
Pacient: Od včerejška. Dneska jsem se cítil hůř.
Lékař: Vezměte si tento lék třikrát denně. Odpočívejte a pijte hodně čaje.
Pacient: Děkuji, pane doktore.
data.transcript_en:
Doctor: Hello, what's bothering you?
Patient: Hello, I have a sore throat and a temperature.
Doctor: How long has it been going on?
Patient: Since yesterday. Today I felt worse.
Doctor: Take this medicine three times a day. Rest and drink lots of tea.
Patient: Thank you, doctor.

questions.question_en: What does the patient have?
How many times a day should he take the medicine?

exercises.answer_key: Bolest v krku a teplotu; Třikrát

exercises.prompt: Listen to the restaurant order and answer.

data.prompt_en: Listen to the restaurant order and answer.
data.transcript_cz:
Číšník: Dobrý večer, přejete si?
Host: Dobrý večer. Chtěl bych gulášovou polévku a vepřový řízek.
Číšník: A k pití?
Host: Jedno pivo, prosím.
Číšník: Velké nebo malé?
Host: Velké, prosím. A ještě minerální vodu.
Číšník: Dobře, hned to bude.
data.transcript_en:
Waiter: Good evening, what would you like?
Guest: Good evening. I'd like goulash soup and pork schnitzel.
Waiter: And to drink?
Guest: One beer, please.
Waiter: Large or small?
Guest: Large, please. And also mineral water.
Waiter: Alright, it'll be ready soon.

questions.question_en: What main dish did he order?
What beer did he order?

exercises.prompt: Listen to the phone call and answer.

data.prompt_en: Listen to the phone call and answer.
data.transcript_cz:
Eva: Haló?
Martin: Ahoj Evo, tady Martin. Co děláš v sobotu?
Eva: Ahoj Martine, zatím nic. A co ty?
Martin: Jdu do kina. Mám lístky na film v 18:00. Chceš jít taky?
Eva: Ráda. Kde se sejdeme?
Martin: Před kinem v 17:30. Tak zatím, ahoj!
Eva: Ahoj!
data.transcript_en:
Eva: Hello?
Martin: Hi Eva, it's Martin. What are you doing on Saturday?
Eva: Hi Martin, nothing yet. And you?
Martin: I'm going to the cinema. I have tickets for a movie at 6 PM. Do you want to go too?
Eva: I'd love to. Where shall we meet?
Martin: In front of the cinema at 5:30 PM. See you, bye!
Eva: Bye!

questions.question_en: When are they going to the cinema?
What time will they meet?

exercises.prompt: Listen to the directions dialogue and answer.

data.prompt_en: Listen to the directions dialogue and answer.
data.transcript_cz:
Cizinec: Promiňte, kde je nejbližší pošta?
Čech: Dobrý den. jděte rovně touto ulicí, pak zahněte doprava na rohu. Pošta je vedle supermarketu.
Cizinec: Je to daleko?
Čech: Ne, je to asi pět minut pěšky.
Cizinec: Děkuji vám!
Čech: Není zač.
data.transcript_en:
Foreigner: Excuse me, where is the nearest post office?
Czech: Hello. Go straight along this street, then turn right at the corner. The post office is next to the supermarket.
Foreigner: Is it far?
Czech: No, it's about five minutes on foot.
Foreigner: Thank you!
Czech: You're welcome.

questions.question_en: Where is the post office?
Where should he turn?

exercises.prompt: Choose the correct present tense form of 'být' (to be).

data.question_cz: Vyberte správný tvar slovesa 'být' v přítomném čase.
data.question_en: Choose the correct present tense form of 'být' (to be).
data.explanation: The correct form is 'jsme': My jsme studenti. = We are students. Conjugation of být: jsem (I), jsi (you sg.), je (he/she/it), jsme (we), jste (you pl.), jsou (they).

data.question_en: Choose the correct accusative form: 'Vidím ___.' (a woman — žena)
data.explanation: The accusative of feminine noun 'žena' (woman) is 'ženu'. 'Vidím ženu.' = I see a woman. Feminine nouns ending in -a change to -u in accusative singular.

exercises.prompt: Choose the correct accusative form of a masculine animate noun.

data.question_cz: Vyberte správný tvar akuzativu (mužský rod, životný).
data.question_en: Choose the correct accusative form: 'Vidím ___.' (a brother — bratr)
data.explanation: The accusative of masculine animate 'bratr' (brother) is 'bratra'. 'Vidím bratra.' = I see a brother. Masculine animate nouns add -a in the accusative singular.

exercises.prompt: Choose the correct gender agreement for the adjective.

data.question_en: Choose the correct adjective: 'To je nová ___.' (kniha — book, feminine)
data.explanation: 'Kniha' is feminine, so the adjective must take the feminine ending '-á': 'nová kniha' (new book). Masculine: nový (dům), feminine: nová (kniha), neuter: nové (auto).

exercises.prompt: Choose the correct present tense verb form.

data.question_cz: Vyberte správný tvar slovesa v přítomném čase.
data.question_en: Choose the correct present tense form: 'Ona ___ česky.' (mluvit — to speak)
data.explanation: 'Ona mluví česky.' = She speaks Czech. 3rd person singular of 'mluvit': (on/ona/ono) mluví. Conjugation: mluvím, mluvíš, mluví, mluvíme, mluvíte, mluví.
